title: Why Most Men Will Never Be Dangerous — And Why That Should Terrify You | Ferrum Doctrine
description:
Most men volunteered to be soft — then lied about why.

Danger is not rage. Danger is optionality under pressure.
21-day field protocol inside. Comment OPERATIVE if you're done performing.
